title: sorghum bicolor subsp. verticilliflorum
intro: Sorghum bicolor subsp. verticilliflorum, also known as Guinea grass, is a type of plant belonging to the sorghum family, characterized by its compact growth habit and verticillate inflorescence. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of sorghum bicolor subsp. verticilliflorum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
